name: Ron White
bio: Ron White is an American stand-up comedian and author, a charter member of the Blue Collar Comedy Tour known for his laconic delivery, cigar, and Scotch, and the nickname Tater Salad. His album Drunk in Public and special They Call Me Tater Salad established him as a solo draw. He has released several gold-certified comedy albums.

timeline.ev: Joins the Blue Collar Comedy Tour
Album Drunk in Public certified gold
Special They Call Me Tater Salad
Netflix special If You Quit Listening, Ill Shut Up

accolades: Grammy nomination for Best Comedy Album (2007)
Grammy nomination for Best Comedy Album (2014)

specials.t: If You Quit Listening, Ill Shut Up

bits.t: I Got Thrown Out of a Bar
